mapper.sql: trip_id AS tripId, owner_user_id AS ownerUserId, title, description, trip_type AS tripType, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt

t.trip_id AS tripId, t.owner_user_id AS ownerUserId, t.title, t.description, t.trip_type AS tripType, t.start_date AS startDate, t.end_date AS endDate, t.status, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.updated_at AS updatedAt
trip_invite_code_id AS tripInviteCodeId, trip_id AS tripId, invite_code AS inviteCode, created_by_user_id AS createdByUserId, status, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TRIP_INVITE_CODE WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC, trip_invite_code_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRIP_INVITE_CODE ( trip_id, invite_code, created_by_user_id, status ) VALUES ( #{inviteCode.tripId}, #{inviteCode.inviteCode}, #{inviteCode.createdByUserId}, #{inviteCode.status} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TRIP_INVITE_CODE tic JOIN TRIP t ON tic.trip_id = t.trip_id WHERE tic.invite_code = #{inviteCode} AND tic.status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRIP_MEMBER ( trip_id, user_id, member_role, invite_status, joined_at ) VALUES ( #{tripId}, #{userId}, #{memberRole}, #{inviteStatus}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
